sections.paragraph: an unused root, i.q. مشع (kindred to מָשַׁשׁ Arab. مَشَّ to wash off), prop. to cleanse, e.g. cotton-wool; hence, to pour out altogether, so as to cleanse a vessel (rein ausgießen), to milk clean (rein ausmelken), to empty a plate (rein abeffen); also to empty by plundering (compare נִקָּה Isa 3:26). Hence [perhaps] מִשְׁעִי.
